remote_models.name: TencentGameMate/chinese-wav2vec2-base
remote_models.notes: Downloaded by the workflow at runtime unless pre-cached.

notes: The audio workflow references Qwen3-TTS nodes but does not expose local model filenames in the exported JSON.
Confirm the exact ComfyUI model directories from the current RunPod volume before uploading to Modal.
Relative paths are an initial normalization proposal for the Modal volume, not yet a verified copy of the current RunPod filesystem.
